title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four project archetypes to build with Claude Code: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an internal operating system. The core argument is that practitioners should focus on building functional systems directly rather than watching tutorials to achieve 10x output.
